title: Best Super Speciality Hospital in Hosur & Krishnagiri | Gunam Hospital
description: Gunam Super Speciality Hospital is one of the best super speciality hospitals in Hosur & Krishnagiri, offering comprehensive healthcare through its team of top doctors.

Check Coverage Options Emergency and Trauma Care 24/7 emergency unit ready for all types of urgent medical situations Dedicated trauma beds and quick check-up areas On-site lab and diagnostic services for fast results Support from senior doctors and use of advanced medical equipment Trained team to handle accidents, heart attacks, strokes, and other critical cases Amenities and Patient Comfort Clean and comfortable private, semi-private, and general rooms All rooms have AC, attached restrooms, and visitor seating In-house cafeteria serving fresh and hygienic food daily Safe and spacious parking area close to the hospital Well-maintained and peaceful surroundings for better recovery Gunam Super Speciality Hospital – Hosur & Krishnagiri Gunam Super Speciality Hospital is one of the best hospitals in Hosur and Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, providing reliable and high-quality healthcare for patients of all ages. Our Hosur hospital has 220+ beds, offering specialised care in cardiology, oncology, orthopaedics, nephrology, gynaecology, and general surgery. The Krishnagiri hospital is a 50+ bed super-specialty centre with emergency services, ICUs, operating theatres, and advanced diagnostic facilities. Trusted across Tamil Nadu, Gunam Hospital ensures safe, effective, and compassionate treatment for routine check-ups, specialised care, and complex surgeries for you and your family.
